title: Caregiver - Browse and Search Product Catalog Without Selecting a PwD (26 Test Cases)
overview: Functional testing of SCRUM-399: Caregiver browses and searches the catalog without selecting a PwD. Validates catalog access, search/filter/sort functionality, full catalog display with device count, recommendation section inactive, no personalization labels, and edge cases.

testCases.title: Caregiver can access catalog page without selecting a PwD
expectedResults: Catalog page loads with H1 heading.

testCases.title: Caregiver banner is visible on catalog without PwD selection
expectedResults: Caregiver banner is visible.

testCases.title: PwD dropdown shows no PwD selected by default
expectedResults: PwD trigger visible with no PwD selected.

testCases.title: Search bar is visible and enabled
steps: Verify search bar is visible and enabled.
expectedResults: Search bar is visible and enabled.

testCases.title: Search returns matching results
expectedResults: Search returns matching results with device count.

testCases.title: Search clear restores full catalog
expectedResults: Clearing search restores full catalog count.

testCases.title: All filter dropdowns are visible
steps: Verify Disability Type, Sub Category, Type, Price Range dropdowns.
Verify Apply Filters and Reset All buttons.
expectedResults: All filter dropdowns and buttons are visible.

testCases.title: Type filter works
expectedResults: Type filter updates results.

testCases.title: Price Range filter works
expectedResults: Price Range filter reduces count.

testCases.title: Multiple filters applied simultaneously
expectedResults: Multiple filters applied show combined results.

testCases.title: Sort dropdown is visible with options
expectedResults: Sort dropdown visible with multiple options.

testCases.title: Sorting changes product order
expectedResults: Sorting changes product order.

testCases.title: Full catalog results are displayed
expectedResults: Product cards and View details links visible.

testCases.title: Product cards have headings
steps: Verify at least one H3 heading in product list.
expectedResults: Product cards have H3 headings.

testCases.title: 'X devices found' count is displayed
expectedResults: Device count text visible with count > 0.

testCases.title: Show Recommendations button is not active without PwD
steps: If no PwD selected, button disabled.
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on catalog without PwD selected.
expectedResults: Show Recommendations button is disabled.

testCases.title: Recommendation banner is not visible without clicking Show
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on catalog without clicking Show.
expectedResults: Recommendation banner is NOT visible.

testCases.title: No personalized badge is visible
testCases.preconditions: Caregiver is on catalog without PwD.
expectedResults: No personalized badge visible.

testCases.title: Selecting PwD after browsing enables Show Recommendations
expectedResults: Selecting PwD enables Show Recommendations.

testCases.title: Selecting PwD and clicking Show transitions to recommendation view
expectedResults: Clicking Show transitions to recommendation view.

testCases.title: Zero results after filtering shows empty state
expectedResults: Zero results shows empty state.

testCases.title: Reset All available after zero results
expectedResults: Reset All restores full catalog.

testCases.title: Pagination works without PwD selection
expectedResults: Pagination works without PwD selection.

testCases.title: Mobile viewport renders correctly
expectedResults: Page renders correctly.

testCases.title: Reset All restores full catalog
expectedResults: Reset All restores full catalog count.

testCases.title: Product cards display price and View Details
expectedResults: Product cards display price and View Details.
